body.text:
{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231619196678FA0CD308F4160162"}"},"total":269},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7601182942490739518","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看过不少的西游同人文，这本给我的感觉很不一样。我已经书荒很久了。这本无论是文笔还是逻辑，都非常好。也不是纯无脑爽文，有主角的努力，智慧，还有跟大圣的兄弟情，都让人觉得慢慢温情。只是希望这本书不是后宫文。支持有cp。但最好感情线专一。一个滥情的主角，还能算主角吗？感觉作者大大应该构思了很久，我感觉大体逻辑很有脑洞，又极其有逻辑。愿书一路长虹，读者多多。","text_exts":[{"e":77,"s":74,"text":"兄弟情","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%85%84%E5%BC%9F%E6%83%85&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774253959F4160162%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227601182942490739518%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227563063211084221502%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%85%84%E5%BC%9F%E6%83%85%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769792902,"group_id":"7563063211084221502","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/Jas1B61eYhIVa1utp/O70=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"65554947625","user_name":"秀州府的咲耶"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"65554947625","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7563063211084221502","book_info":{"abstract":"【书评分刚出，后面会涨！！！】
陆生穿越到西游世界，成为了孙悟空“一石同胞”的弟弟！
作为一名穿越者，陆生没有任何意外地觉醒了西游任务系统。
“叮！”
“检测到任务：【猴王出世】”
“选择一：不做阻拦，与猴王一起出世。”
“奖励：获得“你就是个弟弟”称号！”
“选择二：进行阻拦，使猴王晚一天出世。”
“奖励：资质提升为【后天生灵（灵体）】”
西方佛门为了大兴，开启了西游量劫。
陆生为救兄长孙悟空，开始提前布局，与西方佛门争抢西游功德！
……
西方灵山。
如来皱眉：“那石猴可否出世？”
下方，观音欲言又止：“佛祖，石猴已经出世，只不过……”
如来、一众菩萨罗汉纷纷看向观音。
观音无奈解释：“那石头里不光蹦出了石猴，还蹦出了一个人！”
……
花果山。
陆生坐在王椅之上，下方是十万仙猴大军！
“我叫陆生，花果山常务副猴王！”
“正式向灵山开战！”
取经之路上。
陆生坐在花果山圣地，遥望西方大雷音寺，嘴角微微上扬：
“西游量劫？”
“什么八十一难？统统都是我的人！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2fcd492fa9ea065f836a96720918343d","author":"天行十九","author_id":"","book_id":"7563063211084221502","book_name":"开局花果山，八十一难我说了算！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e8e0d8","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":373,"name":"西游衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=373&name=西游衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7563063434233774654","read_count":"24463","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"962987"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.0","serial_count":"436","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,西游衍生,东方玄幻","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/91b1a082ec158f5bdfc1df85ccd9a954~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779437959&x-signature=PTeYYTSABh73aVBMZxnJPZgbe%2BE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1269303327330428","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"222"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231619196678FA0CD308F4160162"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读8小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":11,"forwarded_count":0,
